news.title: GeneSiC Announces Industry-First 3300V SiC MOSFET
news.summary: GeneSiC unveils world's first 3300V SiC MOSFET, extending the voltage leadership in wide bandgap semiconductors for high-voltage industrial and traction applications.
content: GeneSiC Semiconductor has announced the industry's first 3300V Silicon Carbide MOSFET, representing a major breakthrough in high-voltage wide bandgap technology. The new device extends GeneSiC's voltage leadership and opens new application possibilities in high-voltage power conversion.

The 3300V SiC MOSFET is designed for demanding applications including high-voltage DC transmission (HVDC), medium-voltage motor drives, traction systems for rail and heavy EVs, and grid-tied renewable energy systems. The device delivers the efficiency and switching performance advantages of SiC at voltage levels previously only achievable with silicon IGBTs.

Key specifications include 3300V blocking voltage, 50A continuous current, and 80mΩ on-resistance. The device maintains GeneSiC's trench-gate technology advantages including enhanced ruggedness and 200°C maximum junction temperature.

GeneSiC expects to begin sampling the 3300V device in Q2 2024, with production ramp in Q4 2024. BeiLuo will have evaluation kits available for qualified customers. Contact your BeiLuo FAE for early access opportunities.
news.author: BeiLuo Technical Team

faqs.question: What applications are suitable for the 3300V SiC MOSFET?
faqs.answer: 3300V applications: (1) HVDC transmission - High-voltage DC power. (2) Traction - Rail and heavy EV systems. (3) Motor drives - Medium-voltage industrial. (4) Renewable energy - Grid-tied systems. (5) Power distribution - Medium voltage. (6) Test equipment - High-voltage power supplies. (7) Research - Advanced power electronics. The 3300V rating enables new high-voltage applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: 3300V devices enable high-voltage applications previously limited to silicon IGBTs.

faqs.question: When will the 3300V device be available?
faqs.answer: 3300V availability: (1) Sampling - Q2 2024 for qualified customers. (2) Evaluation kits - Available with samples. (3) Production - Q4 2024 production ramp. (4) Full qualification - Complete before production. (5) Support - BeiLuo FAE support. (6) Documentation - Full datasheets available. Contact BeiLuo for early access.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact BeiLuo now to join early access program for 3300V sampling.

news.title: GeneSiC SiC Devices Power Successful Satellite Mission
news.summary: GeneSiC radiation-tolerant SiC MOSFETs demonstrate exceptional performance in recent satellite mission, validating aerospace reliability heritage.
content: GeneSiC Semiconductor announced today that its radiation-tolerant SiC MOSFETs have successfully completed a major satellite mission, demonstrating exceptional performance and reliability in the harsh space environment. The devices powered critical power conversion systems aboard the satellite.

The mission validated GeneSiC's radiation tolerance claims, with devices operating flawlessly after exposure to total ionizing dose exceeding 100 krad(Si). The wide temperature range capability (-55°C to +200°C) ensured reliable operation through extreme thermal cycles in orbit.

This success adds to GeneSiC's growing flight heritage in aerospace applications. The company's SiC devices are now flying on multiple satellite constellations and have accumulated thousands of hours of space operation without failure.

BeiLuo provides full support for aerospace customers including radiation test reports, enhanced screening services, and dedicated aerospace FAE support. Contact BeiLuo for your space power electronics requirements.
news.author: BeiLuo Aerospace Team

faqs.question: What radiation tolerance do GeneSiC space devices have?
faqs.answer: Space radiation tolerance: (1) Total dose - 100 krad(Si) tested. (2) Single event - SEE characterized. (3) Displacement damage - DDD tested. (4) Heritage - Flight-proven on multiple missions. (5) Screening - Enhanced per MIL-STD. (6) Documentation - Full radiation reports. GeneSiC devices are space-qualified and flight-proven.
faqs.decisionGuide: GeneSiC radiation-tolerant devices are ideal for satellite applications.

faqs.question: What aerospace support does BeiLuo provide?
faqs.answer: Aerospace support: (1) Radiation data - Complete test reports. (2) Screening - Enhanced per customer requirements. (3) FAE team - Dedicated aerospace engineers. (4) Documentation - Full data packages. (5) Design review - Schematic and layout support. (6) Long-term - Obsolescence support. Comprehensive aerospace support.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact BeiLuo aerospace FAE for dedicated support.

news.title: GeneSiC SiC Selected for Premium EV Platform
news.summary: Major automotive OEM selects GeneSiC trench-gate SiC MOSFETs for next-generation 800V EV platform, highlighting automotive qualification strength.
content: A leading global automotive OEM has selected GeneSiC trench-gate SiC MOSFETs for its next-generation premium electric vehicle platform. The 800V architecture will utilize GeneSiC's 1700V devices in traction inverters and onboard chargers.

The design win represents significant validation of GeneSiC's automotive qualification program. The company's AEC-Q101 qualified devices and full PPAP support were key factors in the selection decision.

The platform will leverage GeneSiC's industry-leading 1700V rating and 200°C junction temperature capability, enabling compact, efficient power systems. The trench-gate technology provides enhanced ruggedness critical for automotive reliability.
BeiLuo is supporting this program with dedicated automotive FAE resources, local inventory, and technical support. Contact BeiLuo to learn how GeneSiC SiC can benefit your EV designs.
news.author: BeiLuo Automotive Team

faqs.question: What GeneSiC devices are used in this EV platform?
faqs.answer: EV platform devices: (1) Traction inverter - G3R45MT17K 1700V SiC MOSFETs. (2) OBC - 1200V devices. (3) DC-DC - Various ratings. (4) Voltage - 1700V for 800V battery. (5) Temperature - 200°C capability. (6) Qualification - Full AEC-Q101. GeneSiC provides complete EV solution.
faqs.decisionGuide: Similar devices available for your EV designs; contact FAE for recommendations.

faqs.question: What makes GeneSiC ideal for automotive?
faqs.answer: GeneSiC automotive advantages: (1) AEC-Q101 - Full automotive qualification. (2) 1700V rating - Perfect for 800V EV. (3) 200°C - Design margin for reliability. (4) Trench-gate - Enhanced ruggedness. (5) PPAP - Full production support. (6) Support - Dedicated automotive FAE. GeneSiC is ideal for demanding EV applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: GeneSiC trench-gate SiC is ideal for automotive with AEC-Q101 qualification.

news.title: GeneSiC to Showcase 3300V SiC at PCIM Europe 2024
news.summary: Visit BeiLuo and GeneSiC at PCIM Europe 2024 to see live demonstrations of the new 3300V SiC MOSFET and aerospace-qualified devices.
content: GeneSiC Semiconductor and BeiLuo will showcase the latest SiC innovations at PCIM Europe 2024. Visit us at Hall 7, Booth 325 to see live demonstrations and speak with our technical experts.

Highlights will include the industry-first 3300V SiC MOSFET demonstration, showcasing breakthrough high-voltage capability. Visitors can see switching demonstrations comparing GeneSiC trench-gate technology to planar devices.

The booth will also feature aerospace-qualified devices with radiation test data and flight heritage information. Technical experts will be available to discuss your specific application requirements.
BeiLuo FAEs will be present to discuss your projects and provide local support information. Schedule a meeting with our team in advance or stop by the booth during exhibition hours.
news.author: BeiLuo Marketing Team

faqs.question: Where and when is PCIM Europe 2024?
faqs.answer: PCIM Europe 2024: (1) Location - Nuremberg, Germany. (2) Dates - June 11-13, 2024. (3) Venue - Exhibition Centre Nuremberg. (4) Hours - 9:00-18:00 daily. (5) GeneSiC booth - Hall 7, Booth 325. (6) Registration - Free online. Plan your visit to see the latest power electronics.
faqs.decisionGuide: Register online and visit GeneSiC booth 325 in Hall 7.

faqs.question: What products will be demonstrated?
faqs.answer: Booth demonstrations: (1) 3300V SiC - Industry-first high-voltage device. (2) Trench-gate demos - Performance comparisons. (3) Aerospace devices - Radiation-tolerant options. (4) EV solutions - Traction inverter reference. (5) FAE support - Technical consultation. See live demonstrations of GeneSiC technology.
faqs.decisionGuide: Visit booth for live demos and technical discussions.

news.title: GeneSiC Renews AS9100 Certification with Zero Findings
news.summary: GeneSiC successfully completes AS9100 surveillance audit with zero non-conformances, reaffirming commitment to aerospace quality excellence.
content: GeneSiC Semiconductor announced today the successful renewal of its AS9100 aerospace quality management system certification following a comprehensive surveillance audit. The audit resulted in zero non-conformances, demonstrating GeneSiC's continued commitment to aerospace quality excellence.

The AS9100 certification is critical for aerospace suppliers and covers all aspects of GeneSiC's manufacturing operations including design, production, testing, and quality assurance. The zero-finding result reflects the company's rigorous quality processes and continuous improvement culture.

This certification renewal ensures GeneSiC can continue supplying devices for the most demanding aerospace applications including satellites, launch vehicles, and aircraft. Customers can have confidence in GeneSiC's quality systems and product reliability.

BeiLuo provides full supply chain support for aerospace customers including AS9100 documentation, traceability records, and long-term supply agreements. Contact BeiLuo for your aerospace component requirements.
news.author: BeiLuo Quality Team

faqs.question: What is AS9100 certification?
faqs.answer: AS9100 certification: (1) Aerospace standard - Quality management for aviation. (2) Based on ISO 9001 - With aerospace additions. (3) Requirements - Design, production, testing. (4) Audits - Regular surveillance audits. (5) Importance - Required for aerospace suppliers. (6) GeneSiC - Zero findings in latest audit. AS9100 ensures aerospace quality.
faqs.decisionGuide: AS9100 certification is essential for aerospace component suppliers.

faqs.question: What does zero findings mean?
faqs.answer: Zero findings significance: (1) No non-conformances - Perfect audit result. (2) Quality excellence - Best-in-class processes. (3) Continuous improvement - Ongoing quality focus. (4) Customer confidence - Reliable supplier. (5) Rare achievement - Exceptional performance. Zero findings demonstrates quality leadership.
faqs.decisionGuide: Zero AS9100 findings demonstrates GeneSiC's quality excellence.
